summary: Inspection Grid with Crates Inspected per Row - All features tested and verified. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - Grid columns (Resource, Date, Crates Inspected, Rejected Count, Passed, Reason), h-10 input sizing, Totals footer row, Add Row button, Rejection Summary table with new columns, Rejection Report page with 'Rejected Count' column header.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and integrations verified

seed_data_creation: Used existing test batch: BATCH-TEST-001 (ID: 5833eb23-8664-4a53-8fc7-eedb9ff18178). Created test QC team members and rejection reasons during tests (cleaned up after).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inspection Grid with Crates Inspected per Row fully tested. Key changes: 1) RejectionEntry now has qty_inspected field per row (crates inspected at resource level). 2) InspectionRecord no longer has top-level qty_inspected - derived from sum of entries. 3) Validation: total crates from all rows cannot exceed pending, each row qty_inspected > 0, rejected cannot exceed row's crates × bottles_per_crate. 4) Grid columns: Resource | Date | Crates Inspected | Rejected Count | Passed (auto) | Reason. 5) Passed column auto-calculates per row and shows green. 6) Totals footer row sums crates, rejected, and passed. 7) Grid inputs are h-10 size matching COGS calculator style. 8) Rejection Summary table includes Crates Inspected and Rejected Count columns. 9) Rejection Report page shows 'Rejected Count' column header. Data-testids: rej-grid-row-{idx}, rej-resource-{idx}, rej-date-{idx}, rej-crates-{idx} (NEW), rej-qty-{idx}, rej-reason-{idx}, rej-remove-{idx}, add-rej-row-{stage_id}, insp-submit-{stage_id}.
